title: CropReplant | Auto Replant, Stats, Leaderboard
description: A lightweight crop auto-replant plugin with player settings, admin GUI, stats, leaderboards, permissions and FastStats usage tracking.
body:
## CropReplant

CropReplant is a lightweight farming plugin that automatically replants fully grown crops when they are harvested.

It is designed for survival servers that want smoother farming without making the plugin feel heavy, complicated or intrusive.

---

## Features

- Automatic crop replanting
- Player settings GUI
- Admin settings GUI
- Stats tracking
- Server leaderboard
- Crop-specific leaderboards
- Crop-specific permissions
- Optional seed cost
- Optional cooldown
- Optional boost permissions
- World allowlist
- Configurable messages
- Chat and actionbar message support
- FastStats usage tracking

---

## Player Features

Players can control their own experience with:

- `/crp settings`
- `/csettings`
- `/togglereplant`

Player settings include:

- Replant enabled or disabled
- Messages enabled or disabled
- Sounds enabled or disabled
- Leaderboard visibility enabled or disabled

If leaderboard visibility is disabled, the player’s name will be hidden in leaderboard messages.

---

## Admin Features

Admins can manage the plugin with:

- `/crp admin`
- `/crp reload`

The admin GUI includes:

- Main plugin settings
- Crop toggles
- Crop permission settings
- World allowlist
- Boost settings
- Player default settings

---

## Stats and Leaderboards

CropReplant tracks crop replants and provides leaderboard commands:

- `/crp stats`
- `/crp leaderboard`
- `/crp top <crop>`

This lets players and server owners see who is farming the most across the server.

---

## Supported Crops

- Wheat
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Beetroots
- Nether Wart

---

## Permissions

### General
- `cropreplant.use`
- `cropreplant.admin`
- `cropreplant.settings`
- `cropreplant.toggle`
- `cropreplant.support`
- `cropreplant.stats`
- `cropreplant.leaderboard`

### Crop Permissions
- `cropreplant.crop.wheat`
- `cropreplant.crop.carrots`
- `cropreplant.crop.potatoes`
- `cropreplant.crop.beetroots`
- `cropreplant.crop.nether_wart`

### Boost Permissions
- `cropreplant.boost.nocooldown`
- `cropreplant.boost.noseed`
- `cropreplant.boost.doubledrops`

---

## Metrics

CropReplant uses FastStats to collect anonymous usage metrics such as server count and plugin version.

This helps track how many servers are using the plugin and which versions are active.

CropReplant does not intentionally send player names, UUIDs, IP addresses, chat messages, commands or private server data.

---

## Requirements

- Paper 1.21+ or Spigot 1.21+
- Java 17 or newer

---

## Support

Need help or want to suggest a feature?

Join the support server:
https://discord.gg/eQWM5grgQR
